nodes.name: Megabyas
nodes.summary: Megabyas（Megabyas）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如African shrike-flycatcher。

nodes.name: African shrike-flycatcher
nodes.summary: African shrike-flycatcher（Megabyas flammulatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如African shrike-flycatcher。

nodes.name: African shrike-flycatcher
nodes.summary: The African shrike-flycatcher or red-eyed shrike-flycatcher (Megabyas flammulatus) is a species of bird in the family Vangidae. It is the only species in the monotypic genus Megabyas. Distribution and habitat It is widespread across the African tropical rainforest (including the Dahomey Gap). References External links Image at ADW
